<Badge text="impeccable" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable --skill impeccable -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/impeccable`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/impeccable.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable --skill impeccable -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

The design language that makes your AI harness better at design. One skill + 23 commands (polish, audit, critique, distill, animate, bolder, quieter...) + 44 deterministic detector rules (no LLM) + live browser iteration. Writes PRODUCT.md + DESIGN.md on /impeccable init. Starts from prior frontend-design work; eliminates common SaaS template tells in AI-generated UIs. CLI: npx impeccable install.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable --skill impeccable -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named. Run npx impeccable install then /impeccable init.

## Upstream Maintainer

[pbakaus/impeccable](https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable) (Apache-2.0, high activity)

## Comparable Alternatives

ui-ux-pro-max, shadcn/ui skills, local DESIGN.md patterns, anthropics frontend-design.

&gt; Web-aug 2026 from GitHub + docs.
